product.name: ArBir Su İtici/Su Geçirmez
product.familyDescriptorPl: Dzianiny tkaninopodobne na odzież wierzchnią, także wodoodporne
product.familyDescriptorEn: Woven-like knits for outerwear, incl. water-repellent
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven like Knit Fabrics for Bodywarmers, Jackets and Raincoats
product.specLine: 160 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, High Visible, Waterproof, Woven Like Knit Fabric
descriptions: %100 polyester, 160 g/m², waterproof knit fabric developed for Jackets and Raincoats
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
160 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, High Visible, Waterproof, Woven Like Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

matches.rationale: Explicit EN ISO 20471 certification and hi-vis property plus application image labeled as safety jacket directly support high-visibility apparel use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Waterproof outerwear could be worn in transport contexts, but no explicit vehicle/vessel use is stated.
Chemical resistance and EN 13034 could relate to industrial exposure, but no explicit energy-sector use is stated.
